sections.title: Clinical Phenotypes of Autism Spectrum Disorder
Evidence Gaps & Areas Requiring Clinical Review
⚠ WARNING: No adequately powered RCT of tDCS in ASD — all evidence is pilot/feasibility level
⚠ WARNING: Optimal tDCS target for ASD (DLPFC vs TPJ vs other) — no comparative data
⚠ WARNING: Long-term effects and safety in neurodevelopmental populations — entirely unknown
⚠ WARNING: taVNS in ASD — no published data
⚠ WARNING: Age-specific protocols (child vs adolescent vs adult ASD) — no established guidelines

Evidence Gaps & Areas Requiring Clinical Review
⚠ WARNING: Long-term pain relief beyond treatment block — limited follow-up data (>3 months)
⚠ WARNING: Head-to-head comparison of M1 vs DLPFC vs combined montages for fibromyalgia
⚠ WARNING: Optimal session parameters (number, frequency, intensity) for chronic pain
⚠ WARNING: taVNS for chronic pain — no dedicated fibromyalgia RCT

sections.title: Clinical Phenotypes of Major Depressive Disorder
⚠ WARNING: TPS off-label consent required for all entries
Evidence Gaps & Areas Requiring Clinical Review
⚠ WARNING: Long-term maintenance effects beyond 3 months post-treatment block — limited data
⚠ WARNING: tDCS in TRD — dedicated adequately powered RCT needed (existing data underpowered)
⚠ WARNING: TPS in MDD — no published RCT; urgent need for controlled trial
⚠ WARNING: Optimal combination strategy (tDCS + taVNS vs tDCS + CES) — head-to-head data absent

title: SOZO Evidence-Based Protocol — Chronic Insomnia

sections.title: Evidence Gaps & Areas Requiring Clinical Review
⚠ WARNING: Home-based slow-oscillation tDCS delivery without real-time EEG feedback
⚠ WARNING: Phase-coupled tDCS for insomnia in clinical (non-laboratory) settings
⚠ WARNING: Predictive biomarkers of CES response in insomnia (EEG phenotype, autonomic profile)
⚠ WARNING: taVNS randomised controlled trials specifically for insomnia disorder
⚠ WARNING: Paediatric and adolescent insomnia neurostimulation evidence is essentially absent

sections.title: Clinical Phenotypes of Long COVID / Post-Acute Sequelae SARS-CoV-2
Evidence Gaps & Areas Requiring Clinical Review
⚠ WARNING: Most evidence from case series — selection bias and absence of control conditions
⚠ WARNING: Long-term outcomes and safety in long COVID population — entirely unknown
⚠ WARNING: Optimal dose and frequency in PEM-prone patients — risk of symptom exacerbation
⚠ WARNING: taVNS for long COVID dysautonomia/POTS — no published controlled data

⚠ WARNING: Complex PTSD (cPTSD) — no dedicated neuromodulation study
